full: Representation-only systems challenge the term “world-action model.” If future generation is skipped at inference and only pretrained features remain, the architecture may function more like a temporally informed policy than an active world model.

kernel: Action-as-image avoids modality mismatch but introduces semantic mismatch.
full: Action-as-image avoids modality mismatch but introduces semantic mismatch. Spatially averaging a synthetic frame into an action vector is computationally convenient, yet no physical reason requires motor control to possess image topology.

kernel: WAMs promise better physical grounding while relying overwhelmingly on camera-visible evidence.
full: WAMs promise better physical grounding while relying overwhelmingly on camera-visible evidence. Force, torque, friction, compliance, temperature, weight, pain, and mechanical damage may be weakly inferable or invisible in ordinary video.

kernel: The article presents WAMs as a second major recipe, but the strongest projected endpoint is a hybrid that combines WAM and VLA components.
full: The article presents WAMs as a second major recipe, but the strongest projected endpoint is a hybrid that combines WAM and VLA components. Success may dissolve the category whose rise the article announces.

kernel: Reported comparisons mix different models, training corpora, parameter counts, action representations, inference budgets, embodiments, and evaluation environments.
full: Reported comparisons mix different models, training corpora, parameter counts, action representations, inference budgets, embodiments, and evaluation environments. A leaderboard advantage cannot by itself identify the winning representation paradigm.

kernel: Open video backbones democratize WAM research downstream while concentrating upstream power.
full: Open video backbones democratize WAM research downstream while concentrating upstream power. Robotics laboratories can fine-tune the models, but only a small number of organizations can determine their datasets, tokenizers, physical priors, and representational omissions.

kernel: The language gives the programmer precise control over images while requiring thought at the level of memory locations, scanner positions, raster coordinates, and modulo arithmetic.
full: The language gives the programmer precise control over images while requiring thought at the level of memory locations, scanner positions, raster coordinates, and modulo arithmetic. Expressive power is purchased through cognitive burden.

kernel: The system describes scanners as intuitive conceptual devices, yet their behavior is constrained by machine-specific storage topology.
full: The system describes scanners as intuitive conceptual devices, yet their behavior is constrained by machine-specific storage topology. Moving beyond a surface edge may wrap helically, enter unused memory, or produce unexpected coordinates. The imagined visual space and the actual computational space do not fully coincide.

kernel: The movie language abstracts animation into high-level operations, but many operations remain tied to integer grids and rectangular regions.
full: The movie language abstracts animation into high-level operations, but many operations remain tied to integer grids and rectangular regions. Curves, zooms, rotations, and scaling are approximations produced through deletion, repetition, or local stepping.

kernel: The system allows several scanners to occupy the same square, but their internal memories may disagree after one modifies the value.
full: The system allows several scanners to occupy the same square, but their internal memories may disagree after one modifies the value. Multiple agents can share a location while possessing inconsistent beliefs about its state.

kernel: The camera’s grey-scale image is produced through character glyphs and deliberate optical defocus.
full: The camera’s grey-scale image is produced through character glyphs and deliberate optical defocus. Apparent continuous tone depends upon exploiting an output device designed for text rather than directly controlling luminance.

kernel: The system compresses repeated frames efficiently, but final temporal realization still depends on optical printing and laboratory work.
full: The system compresses repeated frames efficiently, but final temporal realization still depends on optical printing and laboratory work. Digital specification does not yet eliminate the analog production chain.

kernel: Dynamic transformations such as dissolve and zoom are predefined algorithms rather than continuously parameterized spatial models.
full: Dynamic transformations such as dissolve and zoom are predefined algorithms rather than continuously parameterized spatial models. Their cinematic appearance is flexible within narrow procedural templates.

kernel: The language is extensible through macros, but this extensibility can also fragment practice.
full: The language is extensible through macros, but this extensibility can also fragment practice. Each programmer may create a private vocabulary whose semantics are legible only within a particular project.

kernel: The chapter describes computers as protection from human ignorance, but this transfers judgment to whoever designs the system.
full: The chapter describes computers as protection from human ignorance, but this transfers judgment to whoever designs the system. A machine cannot make a person “fail-safe” without embedding somebody’s definition of failure, acceptable conduct, and desirable life.

kernel: The language of symbiosis suggests ecological reciprocity while obscuring asymmetry.
full: The language of symbiosis suggests ecological reciprocity while obscuring asymmetry. Institutions own the hardware, define access, write the software, select permissible parameters, and decide which outputs circulate.

kernel: The computer is presented as liberating humanity from specialization, yet the practice described requires unusual concentrations of mathematical, engineering, artistic, and institutional expertise.
full: The computer is presented as liberating humanity from specialization, yet the practice described requires unusual concentrations of mathematical, engineering, artistic, and institutional expertise. Liberation from one specialization produces dependence on an entire technical organization.

kernel: The chapter celebrates the computer as an active collaborator while repeatedly asserting that it performs only prescribed operations.
full: The chapter celebrates the computer as an active collaborator while repeatedly asserting that it performs only prescribed operations. “Unexpected” output may arise from combinatorial complexity, but surprise to the artist does not itself establish autonomous judgment.

kernel: Mallary’s six levels treat removal of the human artist as the apex of cybernetic development.
full: Mallary’s six levels treat removal of the human artist as the apex of cybernetic development. This confuses increasing machine autonomy with increasing aesthetic value. A system’s independence does not guarantee sensitivity, accountability, or significance.

kernel: The proposed psychedelic computer can optimize or steer emotion, but the text treats this mainly as expanded consciousness.
full: The proposed psychedelic computer can optimize or steer emotion, but the text treats this mainly as expanded consciousness. The same apparatus is equally a system for behavioral conditioning, persuasion, surveillance, and affective capture.

kernel: The new artist is imagined as one individual fluent in both art and technology.
full: The new artist is imagined as one individual fluent in both art and technology. This resolves communication problems by idealizing the hybrid genius while backgrounding collaboration, maintenance, institutional support, technicians, programmers, processors, and operators.

kernel: Youngblood criticizes simplistic computer art whose importance derives only from its technological origin, yet his descriptions sometimes grant technological novelty an almost automatic transcendental force.
full: Youngblood criticizes simplistic computer art whose importance derives only from its technological origin, yet his descriptions sometimes grant technological novelty an almost automatic transcendental force.

kernel: The chapter’s utopian abundance assumes materials become interchangeable and knowledge becomes the unique resource.
full: The chapter’s utopian abundance assumes materials become interchangeable and knowledge becomes the unique resource. Physical extraction, energy, manufacturing, labor, waste, infrastructure, and unequal access are rhetorically dissolved into information.

kernel: Whitney borrows music as the model for visual time while repeatedly warning against simplistic equivalence between sound and image.
full: Whitney borrows music as the model for visual time while repeatedly warning against simplistic equivalence between sound and image. His theory depends on analogy but succeeds only where the analogy is not treated literally.

kernel: Whole-number ratios produce clear periodic resonances, but perceptual value cannot be reduced to mathematical consonance.
full: Whole-number ratios produce clear periodic resonances, but perceptual value cannot be reduced to mathematical consonance. A visually exact resonance may be aesthetically dull, while irregular motion may be highly structured and emotionally powerful.

kernel: He rejects randomness as aimless motion, yet unexpected variation can create tension, rupture, and renewal.
full: He rejects randomness as aimless motion, yet unexpected variation can create tension, rupture, and renewal. The real opposition is not order versus randomness, but consequential variation versus unstructured noise.

kernel: The theory treats resolution as emotionally central, but some temporal works deliberately sustain ambiguity, suspension, or irreconcilable conflict.
full: The theory treats resolution as emotionally central, but some temporal works deliberately sustain ambiguity, suspension, or irreconcilable conflict. Not every meaningful tension seeks consonant release.

kernel: Whitney criticizes abstraction because it draws attention toward the objects rather than the dynamics, but his preferred geometric forms are conventionally classified as abstract.
full: Whitney criticizes abstraction because it draws attention toward the objects rather than the dynamics, but his preferred geometric forms are conventionally classified as abstract. He rejects less the nonrepresentational image than an object-centered account of it.

kernel: The search for innate visual harmony risks universalizing historically and culturally situated aesthetic preferences.
full: The search for innate visual harmony risks universalizing historically and culturally situated aesthetic preferences. Shared sensitivity to periodicity does not establish one universal grammar of visual meaning.

kernel: His field model activates all elements continuously, yet stillness can be a powerful temporal operation.
full: His field model activates all elements continuously, yet stillness can be a powerful temporal operation. Absence, pause, withholding, and near-immobility may structure expectation as strongly as overt differential motion.

kernel: The comparison with music privileges organized temporal continuity and can marginalize cinematic operations such as discontinuity, montage, interruption, narrative ellipsis, and incompatible temporal registers.
full: The comparison with music privileges organized temporal continuity and can marginalize cinematic operations such as discontinuity, montage, interruption, narrative ellipsis, and incompatible temporal registers.

kernel: The theory describes viewer engagement as a dialogue with the composer, but the actual work is fixed before reception.
full: The theory describes viewer engagement as a dialogue with the composer, but the actual work is fixed before reception. The viewer predicts and interprets, yet cannot alter the temporal system’s progression.

kernel: The metaphor of culture as a “program” clarifies how symbols guide action, but risks making people appear as machines executing inherited instructions.
full: The metaphor of culture as a “program” clarifies how symbols guide action, but risks making people appear as machines executing inherited instructions. Actual cultural life includes improvisation, conflict, refusal, ambiguity, error, and deliberate rewriting of the program.

kernel: Geertz attacks the separation of biological, psychological, social, and cultural levels, yet his own account sometimes distinguishes innate capacities from cultural realization too neatly.
full: Geertz attacks the separation of biological, psychological, social, and cultural levels, yet his own account sometimes distinguishes innate capacities from cultural realization too neatly. The exact boundary remains, as he admits, unstable and interactive.

kernel: The essay rejects empty universals but still needs general claims about humans: plasticity, incompleteness, symbolic dependence, and cultural-biological coevolution.
full: The essay rejects empty universals but still needs general claims about humans: plasticity, incompleteness, symbolic dependence, and cultural-biological coevolution. It does not abandon universality; it moves universality from content to developmental mechanism.

kernel: Culture is presented as necessary for ordering behavior, but cultural systems can also produce disorientation, contradiction, domination, and trauma.
full: Culture is presented as necessary for ordering behavior, but cultural systems can also produce disorientation, contradiction, domination, and trauma. Symbolic order is not necessarily coherent, benevolent, or collectively shared.

kernel: The emphasis on becoming human through particular culture can slide toward cultural enclosure.
full: The emphasis on becoming human through particular culture can slide toward cultural enclosure. Individuals inhabit multiple, overlapping, mobile, and conflicting symbolic systems rather than one bounded culture that completes them uniformly.

kernel: Geertz treats particularity as the route to human truth, yet interpretation of particularity still depends on theoretical abstraction.
full: Geertz treats particularity as the route to human truth, yet interpretation of particularity still depends on theoretical abstraction. Detail does not explain itself; the anthropologist decides which differences are consequential.

kernel: The positive-feedback account of biological and cultural development is powerful but can become teleological.
full: The positive-feedback account of biological and cultural development is powerful but can become teleological. It may appear that cultural evolution was directing humanity toward its present condition rather than producing contingent, branching, and sometimes extinct possibilities.

kernel: Culture supplies the symbolic means by which emotions are formed and recognized, but affect also exceeds explicit cultural coding through bodily states, developmental histories, and situations that resist available names.
full: Culture supplies the symbolic means by which emotions are formed and recognized, but affect also exceeds explicit cultural coding through bodily states, developmental histories, and situations that resist available names.

kernel: The claim that every person is a cultural artifact foregrounds formation but can understate power.
full: The claim that every person is a cultural artifact foregrounds formation but can understate power. People are not only shaped by shared meanings; they are governed by unequal institutions controlling land, education, violence, records, and access to representation.

kernel: Sterrett’s historical case is cumulative but circumstantial.
full: Sterrett’s historical case is cumulative but circumstantial. Wittgenstein’s engineering interests, books, travel, and 1914 milieu make dimensional analysis a plausible influence, but they do not prove that it supplied the architecture of the Tractatus.

kernel: The analogy between Tractarian objects and physical dimensions is illuminating but imperfect.
full: The analogy between Tractarian objects and physical dimensions is illuminating but imperfect. Dimensions are abstract kinds of measurable quantity; Wittgenstein’s objects are supposed to be simple constituents of possible worlds.

kernel: Physical similarity explains engineered quantitative models especially well.
full: Physical similarity explains engineered quantitative models especially well. It is less obvious how the same account handles ordinary propositions about pain, promises, color, politics, jokes, or intention.

kernel: Intertranslatability requires machines, conventions, and trained users.
full: Intertranslatability requires machines, conventions, and trained users. If logical form depends upon those practices, it begins to resemble a socially maintained technique rather than an intrinsic structure shared by representations independently of their users.

kernel: A physically similar model preserves only selected behaviors.
full: A physically similar model preserves only selected behaviors. Yet the Tractatus often appears to seek a general account of representation. The analogy may replace one universal form with many purpose-relative similarity relations.

kernel: The courtroom model mixes two different orders: physical causality and normative responsibility.
full: The courtroom model mixes two different orders: physical causality and normative responsibility. A miniature can demonstrate that one trajectory produces a collision, but it cannot by physical similarity alone establish who was legally or morally at fault.

kernel: The parallel between removing arithmetic constants from general physical equations and removing logical constants from propositions may be structurally suggestive without being philosophically identical.
full: The parallel between removing arithmetic constants from general physical equations and removing logical constants from propositions may be structurally suggestive without being philosophically identical.

kernel: Sterrett emphasizes measurement systems as securing contact with reality, but systems of measurement are themselves historically designed, standardized, and institutionally enforced.
full: Sterrett emphasizes measurement systems as securing contact with reality, but systems of measurement are themselves historically designed, standardized, and institutionally enforced. The measure is not external to culture.

kernel: Geertz defines symbols broadly enough to include numbers and computer programs, yet his strongest examples come from religion and art.
full: Geertz defines symbols broadly enough to include numbers and computer programs, yet his strongest examples come from religion and art. The account leaves underdeveloped how scientific equations, instruments, standards, and models acquire meaning differently from ritual symbols.

kernel: The distinction between models of and models for reality is analytically useful, but most symbolic systems perform both functions.
full: The distinction between models of and models for reality is analytically useful, but most symbolic systems perform both functions. A scientific climate model describes possible futures while shaping policy; a poem represents experience while teaching perception.

kernel: Religion is described as clothing conceptions with factuality, but the same process occurs in law, economics, nationalism, medicine, and algorithmic classification.
full: Religion is described as clothing conceptions with factuality, but the same process occurs in law, economics, nationalism, medicine, and algorithmic classification. The mechanism may be broader than religion.

kernel: Geertz emphasizes public symbolic systems while moods are partly embodied, pre-reflective, and resistant to articulation.
full: Geertz emphasizes public symbolic systems while moods are partly embodied, pre-reflective, and resistant to articulation. Cultural symbols can organize affect without fully creating or controlling it.

kernel: The account suggests that ritual validates worldview through experienced coherence.
full: The account suggests that ritual validates worldview through experienced coherence. But internally coherent ritual can sustain false, oppressive, or self-sealing systems that reinterpret all counterevidence as confirmation.

kernel: Religion responds to the threat of chaos by affirming interpretability.
full: Religion responds to the threat of chaos by affirming interpretability. Yet some religious traditions cultivate mystery, contradiction, silence, or the limits of human comprehension rather than a fully intelligible order.

kernel: Geertz contrasts religion with science through commitment versus doubt, but scientific communities also depend on trust, inherited authority, disciplinary ritual, and taken-for-granted instruments.
full: Geertz contrasts religion with science through commitment versus doubt, but scientific communities also depend on trust, inherited authority, disciplinary ritual, and taken-for-granted instruments. Religious traditions can also contain inquiry, skepticism, and interpretive dispute.

kernel: The essay treats cultural patterns as programs guiding behavior, but people can misunderstand, combine, parody, reject, or strategically perform those programs.
full: The essay treats cultural patterns as programs guiding behavior, but people can misunderstand, combine, parody, reject, or strategically perform those programs. Symbolic direction is never equivalent to deterministic execution.

kernel: The transition from symbol to disposition remains difficult to specify.
full: The transition from symbol to disposition remains difficult to specify. The essay explains the relation interpretively but does not establish a causal mechanism showing how one ritual produces a durable motivation or mood in one person and not another.

kernel: The paper calls the models “implicit world models,” but the experiments do not clearly distinguish an internal model of latent state from a highly accurate conditional imitation of environment response strings.
full: The paper calls the models “implicit world models,” but the experiments do not clearly distinguish an internal model of latent state from a highly accurate conditional imitation of environment response strings.

kernel: Exact-match accuracy rewards literal reproduction of textual outputs.
full: Exact-match accuracy rewards literal reproduction of textual outputs. It can undercount semantically correct alternatives while overvaluing environments whose responses are templated and deterministic.

kernel: The paper argues that the models maintain hidden state, yet fuller initial configurations are supplied in some environments.
full: The paper argues that the models maintain hidden state, yet fuller initial configurations are supplied in some environments. State tracking and privileged initialization contribute jointly to performance but are not fully separated.

kernel: High consistency with strong agents partly reflects behavioral similarity to the GPT-4o policy used to collect training data.
full: High consistency with strong agents partly reflects behavioral similarity to the GPT-4o policy used to collect training data. The simulator appears most faithful when the acting policy stays near the behavior of its original demonstrator.

kernel: The W2R consistency ratio is a property of a simulator-policy pair, not solely of the simulator.
full: The W2R consistency ratio is a property of a simulator-policy pair, not solely of the simulator. A high ratio may result from conservative actions, easy tasks, agent adaptation, or model fidelity.

kernel: A consistency ratio greater than one does not mean the simulated world is “more correct” than reality.
full: A consistency ratio greater than one does not mean the simulated world is “more correct” than reality. It means that actions produced during simulation happened to transfer more successfully than the agent’s original real-environment behavior.

kernel: The synthetic-data experiment treats trajectories as successful according to the world model’s own predicted outcome.
full: The synthetic-data experiment treats trajectories as successful according to the world model’s own predicted outcome. The same simulator therefore generates the experience and initially certifies its value, creating a potential self-confirmation loop.

kernel: The early-experience experiment adds an additional supervised stage before policy training.
full: The early-experience experiment adds an additional supervised stage before policy training. Without matched controls for equivalent extra data and optimization, some gains may come from additional training rather than specifically from learning environmental dynamics.

kernel: Mixed-environment training improves several tasks, but this does not yet establish a domain-general world model.
full: Mixed-environment training improves several tasks, but this does not yet establish a domain-general world model. The gains may arise from regularization, shared response conventions, or reusable linguistic schemas.

kernel: Text environments reduce world interaction to discrete descriptions and commands.
full: Text environments reduce world interaction to discrete descriptions and commands. Success here does not establish competence with continuous state, noisy sensing, stochastic dynamics, force, embodiment, or irreversible physical consequence.

kernel: The model returns one textual future and a binary reward.
full: The model returns one textual future and a binary reward. It does not naturally expose multiple plausible outcomes, calibrated uncertainty, hidden causal variables, or probability over transitions.

kernel: If meaning consists exclusively in conceivable consequences, two conceptions with identical observable consequences become indistinguishable.
full: If meaning consists exclusively in conceivable consequences, two conceptions with identical observable consequences become indistinguishable. This can erase differences in explanation, ontology, historical origin, and moral framing that may matter even when immediate predictions coincide.

kernel: Peirce’s appeal to conduct under every possible situation seeks universal meaning, but no investigator can enumerate every conceivable experimental consequence.
full: Peirce’s appeal to conduct under every possible situation seeks universal meaning, but no investigator can enumerate every conceivable experimental consequence. The pragmatic definition may itself remain an ideal rather than an executable procedure.

kernel: James makes philosophical belief answerable to concrete experience, yet his existential examples permit temperament and preference to influence commitment where evidence is incomplete.
full: James makes philosophical belief answerable to concrete experience, yet his existential examples permit temperament and preference to influence commitment where evidence is incomplete. Pragmatism can therefore appear both experimentally disciplined and personally voluntarist.

kernel: Verification explains how propositions are tested, but equating truth with verification risks confusing the means of establishing a claim with what makes the claim true.
full: Verification explains how propositions are tested, but equating truth with verification risks confusing the means of establishing a claim with what makes the claim true.

kernel: A belief may produce its anticipated consequences because it reorganizes behavior rather than because it accurately describes an independent reality.
full: A belief may produce its anticipated consequences because it reorganizes behavior rather than because it accurately describes an independent reality. Pragmatic success can become performative self-confirmation.

kernel: Dewey rejects thought as passive representation, but inquiry still requires some adequate representation of the situation being transformed.
full: Dewey rejects thought as passive representation, but inquiry still requires some adequate representation of the situation being transformed. Reconstruction without sufficiently accurate description can intensify the original problem.

kernel: Instrumentalism judges concepts by efficacy relative to an end, but ends themselves require evaluation.
full: Instrumentalism judges concepts by efficacy relative to an end, but ends themselves require evaluation. An efficient instrument can serve a narrow, destructive, or unjust purpose.

kernel: The essay gives the individual mind a privileged role as the vehicle of experimental change while also locating individuals inside natural and social environments.
full: The essay gives the individual mind a privileged role as the vehicle of experimental change while also locating individuals inside natural and social environments. It underdevelops how institutions determine whose experiments are permitted and whose consequences count as evidence.

kernel: Dewey describes intelligence as the guarantee of a desirable future, but intelligence cannot determine desirability by itself.
full: Dewey describes intelligence as the guarantee of a desirable future, but intelligence cannot determine desirability by itself. Conflicts over values, interests, and power cannot always be resolved as technical problems.

kernel: Deleuze rejects the claim that cinema is a language, yet constructs an elaborate taxonomy of images and signs.
full: Deleuze rejects the claim that cinema is a language, yet constructs an elaborate taxonomy of images and signs. The project resists linguistic reduction while retaining the classificatory ambition of a grammar.

kernel: The claim that image, matter, light, and movement are identical is philosophically generative but difficult to operationalize.
full: The claim that image, matter, light, and movement are identical is philosophically generative but difficult to operationalize. It moves quickly between physical reality, perception, cinematic apparatus, and metaphysical ontology.

kernel: The acentred universe supposedly contains no privileged viewpoint, yet the theory depends upon living centres whose intervals organize perception and action.
full: The acentred universe supposedly contains no privileged viewpoint, yet the theory depends upon living centres whose intervals organize perception and action. The centre is rejected cosmologically and reintroduced biologically.

kernel: Perception as subtraction explains selective attention, but it can understate constructive processes such as memory, expectation, fantasy, language, and cultural interpretation.
full: Perception as subtraction explains selective attention, but it can understate constructive processes such as memory, expectation, fantasy, language, and cultural interpretation.

kernel: The face is made the privileged vehicle of affect, although affect can also be organized through posture, rhythm, sound, landscape, colour, texture, architecture, and collective movement.
full: The face is made the privileged vehicle of affect, although affect can also be organized through posture, rhythm, sound, landscape, colour, texture, architecture, and collective movement.

kernel: The action-image is described as realism because milieus and behaviours actualize one another.
full: The action-image is described as realism because milieus and behaviours actualize one another. Yet many highly stylized, fantastic, and melodramatic films also sustain this structure. “Realism” names a functional circuit more than a representational style.

kernel: The large-form action-image risks universalizing a particularly American narrative ideology: <Situation> → <Individual_Action> → <Reformed_World>.
full: The large-form action-image risks universalizing a particularly American narrative ideology: <Situation> → <Individual_Action> → <Reformed_World>. This structure can naturalize individual agency while marginalizing institutional, collective, systemic, or irresolvable conditions.

kernel: Deleuze borrows Peirce’s Firstness, Secondness, and Thirdness but transforms them into cinematic image-types.
full: Deleuze borrows Peirce’s Firstness, Secondness, and Thirdness but transforms them into cinematic image-types. The resulting system is productive, though it should not be mistaken for a straightforward application of Peirce’s semiotics.

kernel: The historical passage from movement-image to time-image is associated with war, neorealism, and the collapse of established schemas.
full: The historical passage from movement-image to time-image is associated with war, neorealism, and the collapse of established schemas. This creates a compelling periodization but can obscure earlier films that already broke sensory-motor continuity and later films that continue classical action structures.

kernel: The crisis of effective action is treated as a source of aesthetic invention.
full: The crisis of effective action is treated as a source of aesthetic invention. Politically, however, incapacitation, disorientation, and detachment may signify domination or trauma rather than liberation from cliché.

kernel: The taxonomy claims not to impose a hierarchy, yet the movement toward the direct time-image can appear evolutionary, as though classical cinema were a stage that modern cinema philosophically surpasses.
full: The taxonomy claims not to impose a hierarchy, yet the movement toward the direct time-image can appear evolutionary, as though classical cinema were a stage that modern cinema philosophically surpasses.

kernel: The definition of Mitchell’s imagetext as a single latent embedding is too literal and technologically specific.
full: The definition of Mitchell’s imagetext as a single latent embedding is too literal and technologically specific. Mitchell’s concept concerns the constitutive entanglement of verbal and visual media; it does not require that they be encoded as one computational vector. `Mitchell_WJT_Iconology_Image_Text_Ideology.pdf`

kernel: Multimodal systems do not necessarily store text and images as two reversible projections of one identical latent point.
full: Multimodal systems do not necessarily store text and images as two reversible projections of one identical latent point. Architectures may contain separate tokenizers, encoders, cross-attention systems, diffusion latents, alignment layers, and lossy mappings.

kernel: The claim that “holding the words is holding the parameters” overstates controllability.
full: The claim that “holding the words is holding the parameters” overstates controllability. Natural-language descriptions rarely expose the complete state of a generative model, and the same prompt may yield many materially different outputs.

kernel: Operative description is presented as though image-to-text recovery can reconstruct the specification that produced an artifact.
full: Operative description is presented as though image-to-text recovery can reconstruct the specification that produced an artifact. In practice, many prompts, seeds, model states, edits, and hidden defaults can produce similar images. The process is underdetermined.

kernel: Thick prompting risks confusing specified context with generated understanding.
full: Thick prompting risks confusing specified context with generated understanding. A prompt may name intention, code, and stakes while the model reproduces their visual stereotypes without maintaining the underlying social relations.

kernel: The file sometimes treats semantic thickness as something fully supplied by the author.
full: The file sometimes treats semantic thickness as something fully supplied by the author. Geertzian meaning is public, historical, contested, and enacted; it cannot always be compressed into one authoritative prompt.

kernel: Calling a description “operative” because it can regenerate an artifact is insufficient.
full: Calling a description “operative” because it can regenerate an artifact is insufficient. True operationality requires identifiable transformations, constraints, persistence, and predictable consequences-not merely another stochastic generation.

kernel: The movement from image generation to world modeling is asserted too quickly.
full: The movement from image generation to world modeling is asserted too quickly. A system can produce temporally plausible video without maintaining inspectable world state, stable object identity, causal laws, or action-conditioned counterfactuals.

kernel: The file defines imagetext too smoothly as a fused mixed representation.
full: The file defines imagetext too smoothly as a fused mixed representation. Mitchell’s concept is more useful when the tension among visual and verbal operations remains active rather than being resolved into seamless unity.

kernel: The draft sometimes moves from “all media are mixed” to “text and image are two decodings of one latent representation.” The first is a media-theoretical claim; the second is an architectural claim that does not hold uniformly across multimodal systems.
full: The draft sometimes moves from “all media are mixed” to “text and image are two decodings of one latent representation.” The first is a media-theoretical claim; the second is an architectural claim that does not hold uniformly across multimodal systems.

kernel: Calling the embedding itself the imagetext risks relocating the concept into an inaccessible technical interior.
full: Calling the embedding itself the imagetext risks relocating the concept into an inaccessible technical interior. Mitchell’s imagetext concerns materially and culturally available relations among media, not merely hidden machine state.

kernel: The text’s formal analogy- <image : image model :: world : world model> -is cleaner than- <image : image model :: video : world model>, but it remains asymmetrical.
full: The text’s formal analogy- <image : image model :: world : world model> -is cleaner than- <image : image model :: video : world model>, but it remains asymmetrical. An image is an artifact; a world is a dynamic domain. The corresponding relation is not simply object-to-model in both cases.

kernel: The definition of video model as predicting visible continuation remains too narrow for modern systems that accept camera motion, image conditions, edits, or actions.
full: The definition of video model as predicting visible continuation remains too narrow for modern systems that accept camera motion, image conditions, edits, or actions. Some video models occupy an intermediate category between passive continuation and closed-loop simulation.

kernel: The file gives action conditioning special status, but action conditioning alone is insufficient.
full: The file gives action conditioning special status, but action conditioning alone is insufficient. A system may respond to an action token while still violating persistence, conservation, embodiment, or causal consistency.

kernel: The proposed world-text is introduced before its relation to prompt, scene graph, program, simulation script, game state, and world specification is clarified.
full: The proposed world-text is introduced before its relation to prompt, scene graph, program, simulation script, game state, and world specification is clarified. Without this distinction, it risks becoming a new label for already existing forms.

kernel: The Axis Inverter draft correctly criticizes visual coherence as false evidence of simulation, but it still treats “physics” as the principal missing criterion.
full: The Axis Inverter draft correctly criticizes visual coherence as false evidence of simulation, but it still treats “physics” as the principal missing criterion. Social worlds also require institutions, roles, interpretation, authority, and contested meaning.

kernel: The file oscillates between descriptive taxonomy and normative argument.
full: The file oscillates between descriptive taxonomy and normative argument. Sometimes it asks what these models are; elsewhere it prescribes what should count as a world model. Those operations should be separated.

kernel: The distinction between video model and world model is necessary, but the draft makes it too absolute.
full: The distinction between video model and world model is necessary, but the draft makes it too absolute. Some contemporary video models accept actions, camera trajectories, edits, and environmental interventions, placing them between passive sequence generation and full simulation.

kernel: Action conditioning is treated as the decisive criterion, although it is only a minimum condition.
full: Action conditioning is treated as the decisive criterion, although it is only a minimum condition. A model can accept an action token while violating object permanence, conservation, embodiment, causality, or long-term state.

kernel: The phrase “a world model must explain what changes” overstates the requirement.
full: The phrase “a world model must explain what changes” overstates the requirement. Many world models predict transitions effectively without producing explanations. Prediction, simulation, explanation, and causal identification are distinct capabilities.

kernel: The proposed extension from imagetext to worldtext is not structurally automatic.
full: The proposed extension from imagetext to worldtext is not structurally automatic. Mitchell analyzes relations among representational media; a world model concerns state, intervention, and dynamics. The latter requires formal machinery absent from the former.

kernel: Defining a world principally through state, actions, and transitions imports a Markov-decision-process ontology.
full: Defining a world principally through state, actions, and transitions imports a Markov-decision-process ontology. Human worlds also contain memory, ambiguity, inaccessible causes, institutions, competing descriptions, and events whose significance changes retrospectively.

kernel: The draft privileges physics as the test of worldhood.
full: The draft privileges physics as the test of worldhood. Yet worlds can be legal, social, economic, ritual, narrative, or political. In such worlds, rules of authority and interpretation may matter more than mechanical dynamics.

kernel: The analogy “image model renders appearance” understates what image models can encode and overstates the stability of “appearance” as a category.
full: The analogy “image model renders appearance” understates what image models can encode and overstates the stability of “appearance” as a category. Static images can imply causality, history, affordance, social order, and temporal consequence.

kernel: The proposed worldtext risks duplicating existing concepts such as scene graph, game state, simulation script, knowledge graph, interactive fiction, executable specification, or digital twin unless its unique relation among these is made explicit.
full: The proposed worldtext risks duplicating existing concepts such as scene graph, game state, simulation script, knowledge graph, interactive fiction, executable specification, or digital twin unless its unique relation among these is made explicit.

kernel: The Axis Inverter draft gains force by sharpening the divide between rendering and simulation, but the polemic can conceal intermediate systems and hybrid architectures that combine learned video priors with explicit state and control.
full: The Axis Inverter draft gains force by sharpening the divide between rendering and simulation, but the polemic can conceal intermediate systems and hybrid architectures that combine learned video priors with explicit state and control.

kernel: Treat prompt literacy as critical model literacy, not merely as a new form of creative writing.
full: Treat prompt literacy as critical model literacy, not merely as a new form of creative writing. People should learn to distinguish between describing what they perceive, invoking a cultural stereotype and adapting their language to a platform’s hidden conventions.

kernel: Without that distinction, users may mistake successful model control for improved expressive ability.
full: Without that distinction, users may mistake successful model control for improved expressive ability. Education would then train people to accommodate proprietary systems while calling the accommodation creativity. The practical priority is therefore to teach prompting alongside comparison, provenance, bias detection and reflection on what the model repeatedly refuses or fails to represent.

kernel: Evaluate generative AI at multiple prompting intensities rather than debating whether it is intrinsically bland.
full: Evaluate generative AI at multiple prompting intensities rather than debating whether it is intrinsically bland. At minimum, separate default prompting, competent everyday prompting and expert adversarial or iterative prompting—and report the human time, expertise and number of attempts required at each level.

kernel: Without this separation, model advocates can credit the system for expert human steering, while critics can mistake default behavior for the limit of the system’s output space.
full: Without this separation, model advocates can credit the system for expert human steering, while critics can mistake default behavior for the limit of the system’s output space. A tiered evaluation would reveal the operationally important question: not whether a distinctive result can eventually be produced, but how reliably, affordably and accessibly it can be produced under realistic conditions.

kernel: Prioritize construction of a model-independent canon operating system before expanding into additional media.
full: Prioritize construction of a model-independent canon operating system before expanding into additional media. The essential artifact should be a structured source of truth containing entities, timelines, relationships, visual rules, provenance, unresolved contradictions, and approval status.

kernel: AI makes expansion cheap enough to outrun coherence.
full: AI makes expansion cheap enough to outrun coherence. Without durable canon infrastructure, every new format multiplies contradictions, revision costs, platform dependencies, and abandoned commitments. A creator who controls the world model can replace tools and regenerate outputs; a creator who controls only a pile of outputs is dependent on the tools that produced them.

kernel: Do not organize the adaptation around reproducing the Odyssey’s famous episodes.
full: Do not organize the adaptation around reproducing the Odyssey’s famous episodes. Organize it around preserving unresolved judgment: the audience must experience Odysseus as admirable, intimate, deceptive, brutal, wounded, and sovereign without the film announcing which interpretation should dominate.

kernel: Spectacle is now technically abundant and therefore strategically secondary.
full: Spectacle is now technically abundant and therefore strategically secondary. The film succeeds only if its form prevents viewers from converting ancient contradiction into familiar moral categories. Monsters, storms, and battles can attract an audience, but the adaptation’s lasting value depends on whether it can make identification coexist with ethical revulsion. That is the element most likely to distinguish an epic from an expensive adventure franchise.

kernel: Regulate AI deployment at the level of work organization, not merely model safety.
full: Regulate AI deployment at the level of work organization, not merely model safety. Require employers to disclose whether an AI system increases worker autonomy or converts skilled employees into monitored exception-handlers; measure staffing reductions, workload intensification, error responsibility, appeal rights, and changes in professional discretion.

kernel: Debates about whether models are intelligent, biased, accurate, or environmentally costly can leave the decisive institutional choice untouched: who captures the productivity gain and who absorbs the risk.
full: Debates about whether models are intelligent, biased, accurate, or environmentally costly can leave the decisive institutional choice untouched: who captures the productivity gain and who absorbs the risk. A technically competent system can still produce reverse centaurs, while a technically weak system can still discipline labor through the threat of replacement. Governance must therefore target allocation of power rather than wait for a definitive verdict on technical performance.

kernel: Do not regulate advanced cybersecurity models by prompt anecdote or by undifferentiated model access.
full: Do not regulate advanced cybersecurity models by prompt anecdote or by undifferentiated model access. Require capability-based evaluation that compares offensive uplift, defensive uplift, baseline availability from other systems, operational scalability, and the effects of restrictions on authorized defenders.

kernel: The relevant question is not whether a model can produce vulnerability-related code; many tools and human experts already can.
full: The relevant question is not whether a model can produce vulnerability-related code; many tools and human experts already can. The material question is whether access changes the balance between attack and defense. A restriction imposed without that comparison can remove high-quality tools from compliant defenders while leaving adversaries with substitutes, producing the opposite of the intended security outcome.

kernel: Treat provenance and editable decision structure—not prompt convenience—as the decisive requirement for neural CAD adoption.
full: Treat provenance and editable decision structure—not prompt convenience—as the decisive requirement for neural CAD adoption. Every generated object should expose which constraints were supplied, which were inferred, what evidence supports performance claims, where uncertainty remains, and which later edits invalidate prior analysis.

kernel: In professional design, a geometrically convincing error can travel into procurement, fabrication, construction, certification, and physical harm.
full: In professional design, a geometrically convincing error can travel into procurement, fabrication, construction, certification, and physical harm. Natural interaction will encourage earlier and broader reliance precisely because the system feels easier to use. Without inspectable inference provenance, neural CAD turns ambiguity into authoritative-looking geometry while leaving professionals responsible for decisions they may be unable to reconstruct.

kernel: Stop treating electricity and data-center capacity as passive inputs to AI growth.
full: Stop treating electricity and data-center capacity as passive inputs to AI growth. Require major projects to demonstrate marginal social value per unit of power, disclose who bears grid-upgrade costs, and compete explicitly against alternative public and industrial uses of the same electricity.

kernel: The infrastructure is being built on timelines much shorter than those required for grid expansion, regulatory review, or reliable demand forecasting.
full: The infrastructure is being built on timelines much shorter than those required for grid expansion, regulatory review, or reliable demand forecasting. Once billions are committed and facilities are connected, their energy claims become politically difficult to reverse. The crucial decision is therefore not how quickly AI capacity can be constructed, but whether its expected benefits justify locking scarce power, land, water, and capital into that use before the value of the underlying workloads has been established.

kernel: Design every tool call as an authorization request, not as an instruction to execute.
full: Design every tool call as an authorization request, not as an instruction to execute. Separate model proposal, argument validation, permission checking, user confirmation, execution, and result verification—especially for tools that create irreversible external effects.

kernel: The model is probabilistic, while APIs frequently produce deterministic consequences.
full: The model is probabilistic, while APIs frequently produce deterministic consequences. Without an explicit authorization boundary, a plausible linguistic interpretation can become a sent message, altered database, financial transaction, or deleted resource. The decisive engineering problem is therefore not helping the model choose tools more fluently, but preventing uncertain interpretation from becoming unreviewed action.

kernel: Evaluate models as task-specific operating systems with explicit regression suites and total-cost measurements, not as entries in a single intelligence ranking.
full: Evaluate models as task-specific operating systems with explicit regression suites and total-cost measurements, not as entries in a single intelligence ranking. Preserve representative prompts, expected behaviors, token use, latency, and artifact quality across every model upgrade.

kernel: Aggregate benchmark gains can conceal local deterioration, while low unit pricing can conceal expensive inference behavior.
full: Aggregate benchmark gains can conceal local deterioration, while low unit pricing can conceal expensive inference behavior. Organizations that switch models based on headline rankings may discover that the new model is slower, more verbose, less reliable on distinctive tasks, or harder to operate privately. The relevant unit is not benchmark score per dollar; it is acceptable completed work per dollar under the organization’s actual constraints.

kernel: Stop treating “Does scaling work?” as the decisive research question.
full: Stop treating “Does scaling work?” as the decisive research question. Require scaling advocates to specify which capabilities continue improving, at what marginal compute cost, under what evaluation conditions, and where architectural additions become necessary.

kernel: The broad slogan combines several different claims: that larger models improve benchmarks, that they produce novel discoveries, that they will acquire reliable judgment, and that scaling remains the best investment.
full: The broad slogan combines several different claims: that larger models improve benchmarks, that they produce novel discoveries, that they will acquire reliable judgment, and that scaling remains the best investment. Those propositions require different evidence. Separating them prevents a genuine success in one domain from becoming automatic justification for an entire technical and economic strategy.

kernel: Convert the unsuccessful federal proposal into a staged regional investment program with independently verifiable milestones, rather than waiting for another all-or-nothing grant competition.
full: Convert the unsuccessful federal proposal into a staged regional investment program with independently verifiable milestones, rather than waiting for another all-or-nothing grant competition. Prioritize one industry cluster and demonstrate a complete pathway from research and procurement through firm growth to employment for existing Baltimore residents.

kernel: Baltimore’s strongest immediate asset is no longer the rejected application but the coalition and commitments assembled around it.
full: Baltimore’s strongest immediate asset is no longer the rejected application but the coalition and commitments assembled around it. If those commitments dissolve while leaders pursue another large award, the bid will have produced narrative alignment without institutional durability. A smaller executable program would test whether the coalition can deliver, create evidence for future funding, and distinguish genuine regional capacity from aspirational projections.

kernel: Use LOCUS as a discovery and corpus-construction layer, not as an authoritative policy-measurement layer.
full: Use LOCUS as a discovery and corpus-construction layer, not as an authoritative policy-measurement layer. Before making comparative claims, create a human-audited gold subset that restores source provenance, legal hierarchy, temporal status, document order, and jurisdictional applicability.

kernel: At this scale, systematic errors do not remain isolated annotation mistakes; they become state rankings, maps of “paternalism,” claims about local governance, and training signals for future legal systems.
full: At this scale, systematic errors do not remain isolated annotation mistakes; they become state rankings, maps of “paternalism,” claims about local governance, and training signals for future legal systems. The first priority is therefore not expanding the taxonomy or training larger models. It is determining which parts of the corpus can be traced back to current, controlling law and which analytical labels survive independent human validation.

kernel: Train the prediction–feedback loop rather than rehearsing completed performance.
full: Train the prediction–feedback loop rather than rehearsing completed performance. Pause situations before their outcome, force an explicit prediction, identify the cues supporting it, reveal the result, and catalogue why incorrect predictions failed.

kernel: Passive exposure can produce familiarity without improving anticipation.
full: Passive exposure can produce familiarity without improving anticipation. The scarce capability is not remembering what happened but detecting which early signals reliably distinguish futures that still look similar. Explicit prediction turns experience into labelled evidence, while error analysis prevents a successful pattern library from becoming rigid and exploitable.

kernel: Judge an explanation by the counterfactual work its model can perform.
full: Judge an explanation by the counterfactual work its model can perform. A serious theory should support interventions, novel predictions, transfer across altered conditions, and discriminating experiments-not merely redescribe observations in a more precise vocabulary.

kernel: Craik’s central distinction is between a formulation that fits known facts and a model that can run ahead of them.
full: Craik’s central distinction is between a formulation that fits known facts and a model that can run ahead of them. The latter exposes its structure to failure: change the input, interrupt a mechanism, introduce an unfamiliar condition, and observe whether the predicted consequences follow. This converts explanation from retrospective coherence into prospective risk. For a time-constrained researcher, the priority is therefore the experiment that forces rival models to predict different outcomes.

kernel: Treat the harness as the primary product and audit object.
full: Treat the harness as the primary product and audit object. Version, test, document, and govern system prompts, tool permissions, memory rules, routing logic, retries, human approvals, and failure recovery with the same rigor applied to model selection.

kernel: Model outputs cannot be meaningfully evaluated apart from the environment producing them.
full: Model outputs cannot be meaningfully evaluated apart from the environment producing them. Two products using identical models can differ radically in accuracy, autonomy, privacy, cost, and risk because their harnesses differ. Organizations that focus mainly on choosing the “best” model will misdiagnose failures and overlook the layer where most practical control—and most preventable harm—actually resides.

kernel: Create protected disclosure channels for frontier-model risk reporting so that public or confidential safety evidence cannot automatically be converted into punitive evidence against the disclosing firm without an independent capability assessment.
full: Create protected disclosure channels for frontier-model risk reporting so that public or confidential safety evidence cannot automatically be converted into punitive evidence against the disclosing firm without an independent capability assessment.

kernel: A governance system that punishes the most transparent company will produce less transparency, not safer AI.
full: A governance system that punishes the most transparent company will produce less transparency, not safer AI. Firms will rationally soften evaluations, conceal incidents, and avoid publishing uncomfortable research. Regulators would then make higher-stakes decisions with worse information while the least forthcoming companies gain a competitive advantage. The priority is to separate disclosure of a possible hazard from proof that a particular access restriction is proportionate.

kernel: Govern AI through enforceable worker control over deployment conditions rather than through abstract judgments about whether AI is beneficial.
full: Govern AI through enforceable worker control over deployment conditions rather than through abstract judgments about whether AI is beneficial. The decisive rights concern workload, staffing, monitoring, quality standards, liability, refusal, and the distribution of productivity gains.

kernel: The same model can function as a centaur tool in one institution and a reverse-centaur system in another.
full: The same model can function as a centaur tool in one institution and a reverse-centaur system in another. Technical evaluation alone cannot distinguish them because the difference is produced by contracts, management authority, incentives, and accountability. Without governance at the workplace level, even genuinely useful tools can become mechanisms for deskilling, surveillance, intensification, and blame transfer.

kernel: Do not evaluate the reform by the number of AI programs created.
full: Do not evaluate the reform by the number of AI programs created. Evaluate it by whether graduates obtain durable, appropriately skilled employment without producing shortages in complementary fields or oversupplying technical labor.

kernel: Program counts measure administrative motion, not successful alignment.
full: Program counts measure administrative motion, not successful alignment. A government can rapidly rename, merge, or authorize degrees while leaving teaching quality, faculty capacity, employer demand, regional inequality, and graduate outcomes unchanged. The central decision criterion should be verified labor-market absorption over time, not curricular conformity with current industrial rhetoric.

kernel: Establish a compartmentalized access regime for frontier cyber models before imposing broad export controls: accredited domestic agencies and defensive organizations should retain isolated, logged…
full: Establish a compartmentalized access regime for frontier cyber models before imposing broad export controls: accredited domestic agencies and defensive organizations should retain isolated, logged, revocable access under predefined evaluation and use conditions.

kernel: Cyber capability is symmetric. Removing a model from trusted defenders does not remove comparable capability from hostile actors, especially when alternative domestic, foreign, or open systems remain available.
full: Cyber capability is symmetric. Removing a model from trusted defenders does not remove comparable capability from hostile actors, especially when alternative domestic, foreign, or open systems remain available. A blunt restriction can therefore reduce U.S. defensive capacity faster than it reduces adversary capacity. The immediate priority is preserving controlled defensive access while separately governing international distribution and prohibited uses.

kernel: Measure AI-enabled work at the team and knowledge-system level, not only through individual throughput.
full: Measure AI-enabled work at the team and knowledge-system level, not only through individual throughput. Track shared understanding, review quality, onboarding time, cross-team learning, recoverability, and how many people can explain and maintain agent-produced systems.

kernel: A company can record faster delivery while silently accumulating social and epistemic debt.
full: A company can record faster delivery while silently accumulating social and epistemic debt. When employees stop seeing how colleagues think and increasingly accept outputs they cannot fully reconstruct, the organization becomes dependent on agents while becoming less capable of diagnosing their failures. The decisive productivity question is not how much code is generated, but whether the team retains the collective understanding needed to govern it.

kernel: Regulate synthetic abundance through distribution consequences, not merely labels.
full: Regulate synthetic abundance through distribution consequences, not merely labels. YouTube should make provenance, production scale, repetition, automation patterns, and creator accountability meaningful inputs to recommendation and monetization.

kernel: A disclosure badge does little if thousands of cheap synthetic videos continue to dominate search, autoplay, and recommendation feeds.
full: A disclosure badge does little if thousands of cheap synthetic videos continue to dominate search, autoplay, and recommendation feeds. The platform’s ranking and revenue systems determine whether AI becomes an assistive creative tool or an industrial content-flooding mechanism. The decisive governance layer is not generation but amplification.

kernel: Separate child-safety functions into distinct, auditable stages: age determination, risk detection, user-facing support, parental escalation, emergency escalation, data retention, and human review.
full: Separate child-safety functions into distinct, auditable stages: age determination, risk detection, user-facing support, parental escalation, emergency escalation, data retention, and human review. Each stage should have its own evidentiary threshold, privacy limit, and appeal mechanism.

kernel: A single mandate to “protect children” can otherwise authorize an opaque pipeline from private speech to automated classification and external notification.
full: A single mandate to “protect children” can otherwise authorize an opaque pipeline from private speech to automated classification and external notification. The most consequential question is not whether intervention exists, but who receives information, under what conditions, with what confidence, and what happens when the system is wrong.

kernel: Evaluate the AI boom through cash-flow durability and financing structure rather than headline capital expenditure.
full: Evaluate the AI boom through cash-flow durability and financing structure rather than headline capital expenditure. Track who is borrowing, when obligations mature, what utilization rates are required, and whether recurring customer revenue covers the full cost of computation, depreciation, energy, and model development.

kernel: Equity enthusiasm can conceal weak unit economics for years, but debt introduces deadlines.
full: Equity enthusiasm can conceal weak unit economics for years, but debt introduces deadlines. If expected AI revenue fails to arrive before infrastructure must be refinanced or replaced, firms may cut prices, cancel projects, sell assets, or reduce employment simultaneously. Because the largest firms dominate market indices and global supply chains, those corrections could propagate far beyond shareholders who knowingly chose an AI investment.

kernel: Stop using adoption as a proxy for public approval.
full: Stop using adoption as a proxy for public approval. Measure whether AI use is voluntary, substitutable, informed, beneficial to the user, and reversible—especially when systems are embedded by default in search, work, education, health, and communication.

kernel: A society can become highly dependent on systems it neither trusts nor believes it can govern.
full: A society can become highly dependent on systems it neither trusts nor believes it can govern. Once AI-mediated answers replace source browsing and workplace or platform defaults normalize chatbot use, individual behavior may reveal little about genuine preference. Policy based on usage alone will mistake infrastructural dependence for democratic legitimacy.

kernel: Enterprise buyers should treat generative-video procurement as a continuity and dependency problem, not a benchmark contest.
full: Enterprise buyers should treat generative-video procurement as a continuity and dependency problem, not a benchmark contest. Contracts should guarantee model-version access, exportability of assets and prompts, pricing transparency, regional failover, rights documentation, and an operational exit path if the service is withdrawn or restricted.

kernel: Sora and Seedance demonstrate that technically impressive services can disappear because of cost, litigation, or policy.
full: Sora and Seedance demonstrate that technically impressive services can disappear because of cost, litigation, or policy. Once a company builds campaigns, character libraries, approval processes, and software integrations around one generator, model discontinuation becomes a business interruption. The central risk is not receiving a slightly inferior video; it is losing the production system on which the organization has become dependent.

kernel: Define openness operationally across the entire AI stack: model weights, data formats, prompts, agent state, tool interfaces, evaluation records, identity systems, observability data, deployment artifacts, and exit procedures.
full: Define openness operationally across the entire AI stack: model weights, data formats, prompts, agent state, tool interfaces, evaluation records, identity systems, observability data, deployment artifacts, and exit procedures. A system should count as portable only when an organization can replace a component without reconstructing the surrounding application.

kernel: Nominal support for multiple models does not prevent dependency if essential context, memory, policies, and workflows remain trapped inside one provider.
full: Nominal support for multiple models does not prevent dependency if essential context, memory, policies, and workflows remain trapped inside one provider. As AI becomes part of how software is written and organizations make decisions, loss of access can interrupt not just an application but the institution’s ability to understand and modify its own systems.

kernel: Treat AI implementation as a distinct profession requiring domain inquiry, workflow design, evaluation, privacy analysis, change management, and accountability—not merely proficiency with a particular chatbot.
full: Treat AI implementation as a distinct profession requiring domain inquiry, workflow design, evaluation, privacy analysis, change management, and accountability—not merely proficiency with a particular chatbot.

kernel: Organizations that hire people simply to “add AI” will reward visible automation rather than appropriate automation.
full: Organizations that hire people simply to “add AI” will reward visible automation rather than appropriate automation. The quality of deployment depends on whether implementers can identify institutional purposes, affected stakeholders, failure consequences, and processes that should not be optimized. Without those capabilities, AI literacy becomes vendor fluency detached from organizational judgment.

kernel: Use language models as explicit, testable models of linguistic expectation while keeping representational and mechanistic claims separate.
full: Use language models as explicit, testable models of linguistic expectation while keeping representational and mechanistic claims separate. Researchers should compare competing models by how well their internal variables predict neural activity across time, brain region, linguistic level, and context.

kernel: The strongest result is methodological: computational models can generate precise predictions that are tested against millisecond-scale human neural data.
full: The strongest result is methodological: computational models can generate precise predictions that are tested against millisecond-scale human neural data. But collapsing correlation into equivalence would obscure the very scientific opportunity the study creates—identifying exactly where biological and artificial prediction converge, where they diverge, and which additional capacities account for the difference.

kernel: Evaluate entrepreneurship platforms by the durability and quality of the livelihoods they enable, not by the number of entities they register or administrative tasks they automate.
full: Evaluate entrepreneurship platforms by the durability and quality of the livelihoods they enable, not by the number of entities they register or administrative tasks they automate.

kernel: A surge in LLC formation can indicate expanding opportunity, disguised unemployment, tax optimization, temporary side work, or desperation after layoffs.
full: A surge in LLC formation can indicate expanding opportunity, disguised unemployment, tax optimization, temporary side work, or desperation after layoffs. Platforms may successfully remove filing friction while helping normalize a labor system in which workers personally absorb income volatility, compliance risk, benefits costs, and business failure.

kernel: Shift cyber defense toward continuous, AI-speed validation: automated vulnerability discovery, rapid patching, credential minimization, segmented networks, reproducible incident response…
full: Shift cyber defense toward continuous, AI-speed validation: automated vulnerability discovery, rapid patching, credential minimization, segmented networks, reproducible incident response, and adversarial testing under conditions that approximate real attacker access.

kernel: If the principal change is that known classes of attack can be executed faster and by less-skilled actors, organizations cannot rely on periodic audits or slow human escalation.
full: If the principal change is that known classes of attack can be executed faster and by less-skilled actors, organizations cannot rely on periodic audits or slow human escalation. Their survival will depend on reducing the interval between vulnerability creation, detection, and remediation while preserving human authority over high-consequence defensive actions.

kernel: Regulate AI legal services by function and accountability chain rather than by whether a product is called a lawyer.
full: Regulate AI legal services by function and accountability chain rather than by whether a product is called a lawyer. Courts and regulators should require traceable sources, named human responsibility, documented verification, conflict checks, client consent, and clear escalation thresholds for matters exceeding the system’s competence.

kernel: The likely future is not a binary choice between human lawyers and autonomous machines.
full: The likely future is not a binary choice between human lawyers and autonomous machines. It is a layered legal production system in which automated tools perform increasingly consequential work before a human appears. Accountability must follow the actual workflow, because errors introduced during evidence selection, drafting, or filing may shape the case long before courtroom advocacy begins.

kernel: Measure AI’s creative value at the team and product level rather than through output speed alone.
full: Measure AI’s creative value at the team and product level rather than through output speed alone. Track concept diversity, prototype abandonment, revision depth, developer autonomy, shipped quality, player response, production stability, and whether workers retain meaningful control over creative decisions.

kernel: A pipeline can become faster while the work becomes more standardized, precarious, or strategically constrained.
full: A pipeline can become faster while the work becomes more standardized, precarious, or strategically constrained. Without broader measures, “creativity” can become a legitimating label for throughput increases and labor compression. The relevant question is not whether AI produces more options, but whether teams gain greater capacity to pursue ideas that would otherwise remain impossible.

kernel: Treat every A2A handoff as a governed delegation contract containing authority limits, evidence requirements, provenance, cost ceilings, data-use rules, completion criteria, rollback procedures, and a named accountable principal.
full: Treat every A2A handoff as a governed delegation contract containing authority limits, evidence requirements, provenance, cost ceilings, data-use rules, completion criteria, rollback procedures, and a named accountable principal.

kernel: A communication protocol can make autonomous collaboration technically easy before institutions have determined who is responsible when agents misunderstand one another, expose information, overspend…
full: A communication protocol can make autonomous collaboration technically easy before institutions have determined who is responsible when agents misunderstand one another, expose information, overspend, provision excessive access, or produce plausible but invalid work. The central challenge is not enabling agents to communicate, but preserving accountability across chains of delegated judgment.

kernel: A genuinely human-centered AI strategy must specify who gains time, who gains income, who carries new risks, who can refuse automation, and who retains authority over redesigned work—not merely provide training and reassuring language.
full: A genuinely human-centered AI strategy must specify who gains time, who gains income, who carries new risks, who can refuse automation, and who retains authority over redesigned work—not merely provide training and reassuring language.

kernel: Organizations can communicate AI adoption honestly and still use it to intensify work, reduce staffing, or expand surveillance.
full: Organizations can communicate AI adoption honestly and still use it to intensify work, reduce staffing, or expand surveillance. Human centricity becomes meaningful only when it changes the distribution of benefits, decision rights, and protections. Otherwise it is a more sophisticated narrative for securing employee cooperation with an efficiency program.

kernel: The consequential object in agent governance is no longer only the model checkpoint.
full: The consequential object in agent governance is no longer only the model checkpoint. Harness prompts, tool permissions, middleware, memory, verification rules, and recovery policies must be treated as versioned behavioral code-especially when the agent can propose changes to them.

kernel: A system can acquire materially different capabilities and risks without changing a single model weight.
full: A system can acquire materially different capabilities and risks without changing a single model weight. Once an agent can redesign the protocol through which it acts, safety depends on the integrity of the evaluator, the boundaries of editable surfaces, the quality of regression tests, and the ability to inspect and reverse every harness transition.

kernel: Architect agent systems so memory, identity, runtime, tools, skills, and policy remain independently exportable, inspectable, versioned, and replaceable.
full: Architect agent systems so memory, identity, runtime, tools, skills, and policy remain independently exportable, inspectable, versioned, and replaceable. Do not treat “model agnostic” as sufficient portability.

kernel: The strongest lock-in will arise from accumulated context and delegated authority rather than model APIs.
